sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES port

special_mechanics.name: air_pump_weapon
special_mechanics.description: Primary weapon that inflates enemies until they burst

special_mechanics.name: jackhammer_fault_lines
special_mechanics.description: Weapon used at fault lines on the map to create ground faults. When both ends of a fault system reach water, surrounded ground sinks into ocean, killing creatures on it

special_mechanics.name: island_sinking_mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Terrain destruction system where severed island sections sink; player must avoid being on sinking terrain

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics but no quantitative physics parameters (movement speeds, acceleration, gravity values, or sub-pixel precision data). Game uses overhead view maze navigation rather than platformer physics. No technical documentation of movement parameters available in provided sources.
